title: Bloody Death
description: Kill entities in style! Makes blood particles spawn at any entity that dies.
body:
⚠️**Important**⚠️

This mod requires the _[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)_.

<hr>

**Description of Mod**

This is a simple **Fabric** mod designed to make entity deaths a bit more emmersive. What it does, is spawn blood particles at an entity that dies. You can toggle the mod with /toggleentityblood. That's it. For reference of this mod, refer to the **Mod Demonstraion Video** below, or visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloody-death/gallery).**

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1Wg_CP1g_m4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<hr>

**Why download?**

When something dies, its better for it to have some sort of dramatic effect; it makes it more **emmersive**.

<hr>

**Donate?**

A **donation** would help me a lot. If you would like to donate, consider using the link under "Links", on this page.
